title: viola lactiflora
intro: Viola lactiflora, also known as Chinese or Asian violet, is a flowering plant species native to China and Korea, characterized by its fragrant, white or pale purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Viola lactiflora include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Viola lactiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin issues and wounds.
